en-us.html:
The first High King of Asgartha urges us to venture forth!

Story

393 AC - My fingers grip tighter around the edges of the scroll as I feel my stomach start to churn. I hear someone speaking to me but I can't peel my eyes from the text. I read it and reread it again and again. Everything is a blur around me, while the blood in my temples hammers rhythmically like a blacksmith's mallet. I let the parchment drop to the ground…

"There is no escape. My crown is my cage. Like the Tumult, my prison is a snake biting its own tail. No beginning, no end. But to atone for my crimes, I must not break the cycle. Such is my damnation, and at the same time, my rebirth. Do not despair, however. Those of you who still can, keep going. You hold the key to renewal in your hands. In Avalon, the king will awaken. RUNE"

I place a hand on the wall to calm down my breathing and to stop myself from falling over. My migraine returns, stronger than ever this time. It's as if someone is digging within my skull, as if something is trying to get out, trying to scream, but failing to do so… But when I try to focus on this feeling, all I get is white noise.

Narrator

WARU

blocks.text: The first High King of Asgartha urges us to venture forth!

blocks.title: Story
paragraphs: 393 AC - My fingers grip tighter around the edges of the scroll as I feel my stomach start to churn. I hear someone speaking to me but I can't peel my eyes from the text. I read it and reread it again and again. Everything is a blur around me, while the blood in my temples hammers rhythmically like a blacksmith's mallet. I let the parchment drop to the ground…

"There is no escape.
My crown is my cage.
Like the Tumult, my prison is a snake biting its own tail.
No beginning, no end.
But to atone for my crimes, I must not break the cycle.
Such is my damnation, and at the same time, my rebirth.
Do not despair, however. Those of you who still can, keep going.
You hold the key to renewal in your hands.
In Avalon, the king will awaken.
RUNE"

I place a hand on the wall to calm down my breathing and to stop myself from falling over. My migraine returns, stronger than ever this time. It's as if someone is digging within my skull, as if something is trying to get out, trying to scream, but failing to do so… But when I try to focus on this feeling, all I get is white noise.

fr-fr.html:
Le premier Haut-Roi d'Asgartha nous exhorte à partir à l'aventure !

Histoire

393 AC - Mes doigts se crispent sur les bords du rouleau, alors que je sens mon ventre se nouer. J'entends qu'on me parle, mais je ne peux détourner les yeux du texte, que je lis et relis encore et encore. Tout est flou autour de moi, tandis que le sang bat dans mes tempes avec la délicatesse d'un maillet. Je laisse choir le parchemin...

"Il n'y a pas d'échappatoire. Ma couronne est ma cage. Ma prison, comme le Tumulte, est un serpent qui se mord la queue. Sans origine, ni fin. Mais pour expier mes crimes, je me dois de ne pas briser le cercle. Telle est ma damnation, et en même temps, ma renaissance. Ne désespérez pas cependant, et continuez votre route, vous qui le pouvez encore. Vous avez entre vos mains la clé du renouveau. En Avalon, le roi s'éveillera. RUNE"

Je pose une main sur le mur pour m'empêcher de m'affaisser, essayant de calmer ma respiration. À nouveau, la migraine, bien plus forte cette fois. Comme si on creusait dans mon crâne, comme si quelque chose essayait de sortir, de crier, sans pour autant y parvenir... Mais quand j'essaie de m'appesantir sur cette sensation, tout ce que je trouve, c'est du bruit blanc.

Narré par

WARU

blocks.text: Le premier Haut-Roi d'Asgartha nous exhorte à partir à l'aventure !
